phase: Phase 4B - Frontend Operational Experience & Mission Control Shell
purpose: Execution-grade Phase 4B ticket queue for noob-proof Mission Control frontend implementation after product-definition merge.
core_lesson: Autonomous execution was not the root problem in earlier phases; stale, shallow, under-specified, or non-predictive tickets were the root problem. This pack requires exact-file plans, explicit dependencies, concrete outcomes, split conditions, and stop conditions before implementation.
maximum_concrete_capability_rule: Each implementation ticket must produce the strongest safe runtime, validation, artifact, UI, or evidence outcome inside Phase 4B scope. Documentation-only completion is not acceptable for implementation tickets.
hard_boundaries: full module-driven notification semantics, delivery, retention, mentions, email/SMS/WhatsApp routing, or escalation
full dashboard marketplace, offline-first sync queue, real-time collaboration, macro/scripting sandbox
Prisma/schema/migration changes unless a later approved ticket explicitly says otherwise
generated registry edits unless regeneration proves no drift
package/dependency changes outside P4B-001 exact-file authority
